idea-plugin.name: Claude Review
idea-plugin.description:
AI-Powered Code Review on Save

Claude Review runs Claude Code on your unstaged git diffs every time you save a file, showing findings as inline editor annotations with gutter icons.

Features

  • Automatic review on file save via the Claude CLI (claude -p)
  • Inline annotations with severity-based underlines (bug, warning, info)
  • Gutter icons for quick visual scanning
  • Content-hash caching to avoid redundant API calls
  • Configurable review prompt with ${FILE} and ${PROJECT} variables
  • Per-project enable/disable toggle
  • Customizable severity mapping

Requirements

  • Claude Code CLI installed
  • Git-tracked project
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.1

  • Replace deprecated APIs flagged by Plugin Verifier (addBrowseFolderListener, createSingleFileDescriptor)
  • Add pluginVerification config with recommended IDE set

1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • ExternalAnnotator-based code review on save
  • Configurable prompt, timeout, severity mapping
  • Content-hash caching
